runway_notes.15:
RWY 15 - grass, left-hand pattern (inference, keeps pattern east away from Beromuenster town).
Elev 2146 ft; pattern altitude 3146 ft (1000 ft AGL), round to 3200 ft.
AFIS 122.450.
PPR for non-based aircraft and visiting pilots on RWY 33 per Wikipedia.
Open rural topography, no TMA conflicts.
runway_notes.33:
RWY 33 - grass, right-hand pattern (inference, keeps pattern east away from Beromuenster town).
Elev 2146 ft; pattern altitude 3146 ft (1000 ft AGL), round to 3200 ft.
AFIS 122.450.
PPR for non-based aircraft and visiting pilots on RWY 33 per Wikipedia.

metadata.source: X-Plane apt.dat (ARP, runway thresholds, AFIS frequency); Wikipedia DE for elevation and runway dimensions; VRPs are plausibility-based topographic inferences
metadata.verified_by: thWelly + plugin-author research; VRPs and pattern direction are plausibility-based - needs verification against current Skyguide VAC before flight
metadata.notes: Name 'Luzern-Beromuenster' transliterated from 'Luzern-Beromuenster' to ASCII per ImGui-only-ASCII rule. Elevation 2146 ft per Wikipedia (apt.dat 2245 deviates - prefer Wikipedia/AIP). Glider parallel 15/33 GLD omitted. VRPs N/E/S/W are topographic placeholders ~2.5-3 NM from ARP - not published Skyguide VAC reporting points. Pattern direction (15=left, 33=right) inferred to keep pattern east, away from Beromuenster town to the west. AFIS 122.450 confirmed by apt.dat row 1051.
